allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb = json.load\(open\('notebooks/run.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('cells:', len\(nb['cells']\)\); print\('first cell type:', nb['cells'][0]['cell_type'] if nb['cells'] else 'none'\); [print\(i, c['cell_type'], \(c.get\('source', ['']\)[0] if c.get\('source'\) else ''\)[:80]\) for i, c in enumerate\(nb['cells'][:6]\)]")
